title: Eden anglers fair well in nationals
description: REGIONAL NEWS - The Eden angling teams did...
bodyText:
REGIONAL NEWS - The Eden angling teams did very well in each division of the Shore Angling Senior B and Development nationals that were held in Mossel Bay from 12 to 16 February.


> The fishing was on the tough side, but the B Division team achieved second place out of nine teams/provinces and the development team scooped first place out of five teams/provinces.


In the individual standings for the Development Division, Eden had two anglers in the top six: Henrico Meyer (third) and Marko Reynders (first), while the B Division individual standings saw one Eden angler in the top six: Paul Kruger.

B Division Top 6 anglers from left: Uwe Geissler (WP- 5th), Wallie Stroebel (EP - 6th), Henrico Helm (EP - 1st), Shane Rajbully (KZN Inland - 4th), Paul Kruger (Eden - 3rd) and Jeremy Stobbs (EP - 2nd).

The Eden Development team, from left, back: Hendrick Smit, Marko Reynders and Gerhard Faber (jnr). Front: Henrico Meyer, Franco Lamberti, Heini Gossman (coach), Gerhard Faber and Israah de Villiers.

The Development Division top six anglers are, from left: J Barnard (Border - 2nd), Henrico Meyer (Eden - 3rd), W Kleyn (EP - 5th), Marko Reynders (Eden - 1st), F Thyse (EP - 4th) and D Campher (WP - 6th).

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
